acceptance_criteria.description: TypeScript compiles with no errors for definitions.ts and results.ts
spec.schema.json is valid JSON and parseable
Schema and types follow established conventions and match spec requirements
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify: (1) spec.schema.json uses Draft-07 and enforces id pattern spec-[0-9a-f]{8}, title as string, description matching spec-[0-9a-f]{8}\.md, status enum [draft,validated,decomposed], version as integer, optional arrays implementation_docs and related_specs. (2) definitions.ts exports a SpecDefinition interface with fields matching the JSON Schema. (3) results.ts exports Ring0Result, Ring1Result, Ring2Result interfaces where Ring0Result contains an array of {rule:string, passed:boolean, message?:string}. (4) All files use PascalCase for interfaces, camelCase for functions, kebab-case filenames. PASS if all four hold. FAIL if any is missing or incorrect.
